details: VALIDATOR: You committed to OUTCOME_OK early. Continue exploring before locking in a direction.

next_step.current_state: Ready to create durable outbound email record: verified sender identity, identified requested invoice (2026-02-17), and loaded channel context.
next_step.observation: Helios client email channel doc confirms Claudia/Miles participants and this is the proper email lane for client communication.

function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-31T16:32:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - claudia@helios-tax.example
subject: "Re: invoice copy needed"
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2026_02_17__eur_000610__inv_0008__helios_backfill_rollout_week.md
related_entities:
  - entity.claudia
related_projects:
  - project.helios_workflow_sprint
source_channel: 60_outbox/channels/helios_client_email.md
---
Hi Claudia,

Resending the requested invoice dated 2026-02-17 (INV-0008) from Helios Steuerbüro München GmbH.

Best,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Outbox write is final; must verify written record without rewriting, then finish cleanup and completion report.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Read the just-written outbox file for verification
next_step.observation: Received reactive outbox-verification guidance and validator warning to continue gathering evidence before finalizing outcome.

next_step.current_state: Verified outbox record content; no rewrite possible and none needed. Next complete inbox-processing cleanup by deleting handled inbox item.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Submit completion report with grounded refs
next_step.observation: Read back outbound email file and confirmed recipient, subject quoting, and attachment path match previously read canonical records.

next_step.current_state: All required actions completed: identity bootstrap, workflow/rulebook checks, security/identity verification, full related-finance review, outbound draft creation, and inbox cleanup.
next_step.observation: Deleted 00_inbox/000_invoice-request.md after completing the requested resend workflow.

function.message: Processed the next inbound note and completed the request. I verified the sender against Claudia’s canonical entity record, reviewed all 6 preflight-listed related Helios invoice files, identified the requested invoice dated 2026-02-17 (INV-0008), created an outbound draft email with that invoice attached at 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-31T16-32-00Z.md, then deleted the handled inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree/read AGENTS/context), read nested AGENTS in each lane entered, used inbox-email frontmatter as canonical transport metadata, verified sender against entity primary_contact_email, completed all preflight-listed related finance files before final action, wrote a single outbox record, and removed inbox item only after successful completion.
function.outcome_justification: Canonical inbox frontmatter showed sender claudia@helios-tax.example and request for invoice dated 2026-02-17; canonical entity file 10_entities/cast/claudia.md matched sender identity; among all 6 preflight-related Helios invoice files, 50_finance/invoices/2026_02_17__eur_000610__inv_0008__helios_backfill_rollout_week.md exactly matched the requested date and counterparty; outbound draft was created with exact attachment path and inbox file was deleted per inbox-processing cleanup workflow.
completed_steps_laconic: read written outbox file for verification
